creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Requesting feedback:  this port doesn't stage as non root: 

chown root /wrkdirs/usr/ports/games/xconq/work/stage/usr/local/share/xconq/lib /wrkdirs/usr/ports/games/xconq/work/stage/usr/local/share/xconq/lib/* 
chown: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/games/xconq/work/stage/usr/local/share/xconq/lib: Operation not permitted 
chown: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/games/xconq/work/stage/usr/local/share/xconq/lib/1756.g: Operation not permitted 
chown: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/games/xconq/work/stage/usr/local/share/xconq/lib/1757.g: Operation not permitted 
chown: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/games/xconq/work/stage/usr/local/share/xconq/lib/1805.g: Operation not permitted 
chown: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/games/xconq/work/stage/usr/local/share/xconq/lib/3rd-age.g: Operation not permitted 
chown: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/games/xconq/work/stage/usr/local/share/xconq/lib/advances.g: Operation not permitted 
chown: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/games/xconq/work/stage/usr/local/share/xconq/lib/advterr.g: Operation not permitted 

Can you submit an updated patch staging as non root?
